stem: In right triangle PQR, the right angle is at P. The hypotenuse QR has length 65, and side PQ has length 16. What is the value of sin Q?
rationale: By the Pythagorean theorem, PR² = 65² − 16² = 4225 − 256 = 3969, so PR = 63. The sine of angle Q is the ratio of the side opposite Q (which is PR) to the hypotenuse QR: sin Q = 63/65 ≈ 0.9692.
